title: HighTide's Full Roman Numerals
description: This project is a resource pack that fixes Minecraft's roman numerals so they display properly.
body:
**HighTide's Full Roman Numerals** is a resource pack that fixes the issue where enchantments higher than level 10 will appear as `enchantment.level.11` all the way until `enchantment.level.255`. This happens becuase Mojang didn't expect people to apply higher enchantments, even if we do. This resource pack fixes this by replacing enchantment.level.11 - enchantment.level.255 with the actual roman numerals. Here's some examples:
Spoiler
  • Instead of enchantment.level.156, its CLVI.
  • Instead of enchantment.level.148, its CXLVIII.
  • Instead of enchantment.level.238, its CCXXXVIII.
And the list can just keep going...
If Mojang ever decides to increase the enchantment level limit back to 32767, I'll be sure to update this resource pack to have roman numerals all the way up until `ↂↂↂↀↀDCCLXVII` (32767).
